name: mirror-indents-hanging
description: P0: mirrorIndents + start=1440, hanging=720. P1: mirrorIndents + start=1440, no hanging. P2: start=1440, hanging=720, no mirrorIndents.
expected_behavior: P0: Word has known bug — misaligns hanging indent on odd pages. P1: mirrorIndents swaps start/end on even pages. P2: normal hanging indent behavior.
current_status: GAP — we don't parse mirrorIndents at all
